description: Check your organization's current credit balance
steps: Look at the top navigation bar — the org's credit balance is always shown there
Switch orgs via the org switcher to see a different org's balance
explanation: Credits belong to your organization, not individual accounts. Every team member draws from the same pool. Credits never expire when purchased.
expected_outcome: Credit balance number visible in navbar

validation.rule: Navbar shows a number representing current org credit balance

common_errors: Seeing wrong balance — check which org is selected in the org switcher

description: Purchase a credit pack for your organization
steps: Go to Settings → Billing → Buy Credits
expected_outcome: Credit balance increases immediately after payment. Credits never expire.

validation.rule: Navbar credit balance increased by the purchased amount within 2-3 minutes

common_errors: Billing page not accessible — only Admins can access it; check your role
Payment processed but credits not appearing — wait 2-3 minutes (Stripe webhook). If still not showing after 10 minutes, contact support with payment confirmation number.
Can't access billing — email may not be verified; verify email first

description: Select or upgrade your Hub subscription plan
steps: Click a plan to go to Stripe checkout
Plan and credits update automatically after payment
expected_outcome: Plan reflected immediately in your Hub account

validation.rule: Settings → Billing shows updated plan name; VLA option unlocked in fine-tuning wizard if on Plus/Pro

common_errors: Upgrade not reflecting — wait up to 2 minutes and refresh. Contact support after 5 minutes.
Upgrade/downgrade timing — upgrades apply immediately; other changes take effect at next billing cycle

description: View breakdown of how credits have been consumed
steps: Scroll to the usage history table
expected_outcome: Table showing credit consumption over time, itemized by metered feature

validation.rule: Usage history table visible with timestamped rows of credit spend
